name: wakeagain-mobile
description: WakeAgain — Capacitor shell for Google Play & Apple App Store (same API as web)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run cap:sync && node scripts/patch-android.js && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.add:android: npx cap add android && node scripts/patch-android.js
scripts.build:store:prep: node scripts/require-prod-api.js && npm run cap:sync && node scripts/patch-android.js
